merge_history.details: gh command unavailable and no git remote configured
No PR available to mark ready/merge

findings: Repository governance and roadmap are aligned around defensive, education-first security workflows.
Lint baseline had one unused import issue in substrate/studio/main.py and was remediated.
Targeted pytest command fails in clean env without PYTHONPATH and reveals two connection-test regressions when import path is fixed.
risks: Test command reproducibility risk due to unresolved substrate import path in default invocation.
Potential behavior/test mismatch in connection service command assembly.
Automation collaboration context is degraded when gh and remotes are unavailable.

tasks.task: Stabilize pytest path resolution for substrate package
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Targeted test command passes from clean checkout without manual environment overrides

tasks.task: Align run_connection_test behavior with tests or update tests with approved behavior
Document fallback behavior when gh CLI is absent
tasks.acceptance_criteria: docs include git-only context procedure and known limitations

test_results.command: uv run --with ruff ruff check substrate scripts tests
uv run python -m compileall substrate scripts
uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests/studio/test_connection.py tests/studio/test_api.py
uv run --with ruff ruff check substrate scripts tests
PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests/studio/test_connection.py tests/studio/test_api.py

assumptions: Cloud route unavailable in this shell, so fallback_local_mock route used.
No remotes configured means origin/main comparison fields are best-effort.
next_cycle_focus: Restore remote+gh integration for rolling PR automation
